info.name: Banking API - End User
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for testing Banking API endpoints as an end user. Includes OAuth authentication flow, account management, transaction operations, user profile management, and negative testing scenarios.

**Prerequisites:**
- Environment configured with OAuth settings
- Valid end user client credentials
- Banking API server running

**Usage:**
1. Run 'OAuth Login Flow' first to authenticate
2. Execute other requests in logical order
3. Use Collection Runner for automated testing
4. Review negative tests to verify proper access control

**Scopes Required:**
- banking:read (for account and transaction viewing)
- banking:write (for transaction creation and profile updates)
- profile (for user profile access)

**Test Coverage:**
- OAuth 2.0 authentication with PKCE
- Account management (view own accounts)
- Transaction management (create/view own transactions)
- User profile management (view/update own profile)
- Negative tests (verify admin endpoint access is denied)
- Authorization and scope validation

exec: console.log('🚀 Banking API - End User Collection');
// Skip token validation for OAuth requests
console.log('⚠️ Token invalid - run OAuth Login Flow first');
pm.test('No sensitive data in response headers', function () {

item.name: 5. Negative Tests - Unauthorized Access
item.description: Negative test cases to verify proper authorization and access control - end users should not be able to access admin endpoints or other users' data

exec: console.log('🚫 Negative Test: Attempting to access admin statistics');
console.log('⚠️ This request should fail with 403 Forbidden');
console.log('🔐 End user token does not have banking:admin scope');
pm.test('Admin stats access is denied', function () {
pm.test('Error response has proper structure', function () {
// Ensure no admin statistics are returned in error response
console.log('✅ Negative test PASSED - admin stats access properly denied');
console.log('❌ Negative test FAILED - admin stats access was not denied');

request.description: Negative test: End user should not be able to access admin statistics. Should return 403 Forbidden due to insufficient scope (requires banking:admin).
